global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with layered abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore travel destinations with special fares.

elements.label: teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Various abstract shapes in lighter shades of teal are scattered across the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: central rectangle
elements.description: A large, centered rectangle with rounded corners, serving as a focal point for the ad's content.

elements.label: oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape in a lighter color is positioned in the center, enhancing the design's depth.

elements.label: large oval
elements.description: A larger oval shape is placed centrally, contributing to the ad's layered look.

elements.label: small icon
elements.description: A small icon located at the top left, possibly representing a feature or service.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle at the bottom center, its purpose is unclear but adds to the design.

elements.label: medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circle positioned slightly above the small circle, contributing to the abstract theme.

elements.label: top right icon
elements.description: A small icon located at the top right corner, possibly indicating a feature or branding.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle in the center, its purpose is not defined but adds to the overall layout.

elements.label: main text
elements.description: Bold white text at the bottom, reading 'Dream destinations await Special fares today', clearly visible against the background.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: Prominent text at the top, stating 'WayPoint', designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: dream text
elements.description: Smaller text in the center reading 'Dream', adding an aspirational element to the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A clear call to action at the bottom, stating 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting users to engage.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown advertiser, unknown vertical, rewarded_video format, modern and abstract visual style, key elements include bold text and abstract shapes.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint, Dream, destinations await, Special fares today, Claim reward
